name: whatsapp
description: WhatsApp Cloud API channel for receiving and responding to WhatsApp messages
formatting_hints: Use WhatsApp-friendly plain text with light emphasis only. Avoid markdown tables, long fenced code blocks, and dense nested structure.

required_secrets.name: whatsapp_access_token
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WhatsApp Cloud API access token (from Meta Developer Portal)

required_secrets.name: whatsapp_verify_token
required_secrets.prompt: Webhook verify token used for Meta's GET callback verification

required_secrets.name: whatsapp_app_secret
required_secrets.prompt: Meta app secret used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 webhook signatures
